inputs.label: Initial Investment
inputs.businessContext: The lump sum amount you invest initially.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lump sum amount you invest initially.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der einmalige Anfangsbetrag, den Sie investieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant forfaitaire que vous investissez initialement.
businessContext_i18n.es: El monto único que invierte inicialmente.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: The fixed amount you invest each month.

businessContext_i18n.en: The fixed amount you invest each month.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der feste Betrag, den Sie monatlich investieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant fixe que vous investissez chaque mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: El monto fijo que invierte cada mes.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annualized return rate of the mutual fund.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annualized return rate of the mutual fund.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırım fonunun beklenen yıllık getiri oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de rendement annualisé attendu du fonds commun de placement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento anualizada esperada del fondo mutuo.

inputs.label: Investment Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of years you plan to stay invested.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years you plan to stay invested.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, die Sie investiert bleiben möchten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années pendant lesquelles vous prévoyez de rester investi.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años que planea mantener la inversión.

inputs.label: Expected Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected average annual inflation rate to adjust future value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected average annual inflation rate to adjust future value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecek değeri ayarlamak için beklenen ortalama yıllık enflasyon oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete durchschnittliche jährliche Inflationsrate zur Anpassung des zukünftigen Werts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel moyen attendu pour ajuster la valeur future.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de inflación anual promedio esperada para ajustar el valor futuro.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
